title: Writing Reusable Functions
objectives: Define functions with def and return values
Write functions with default parameter values
hints: Define a function: def add(a, b): return a + b
Default parameters: def greet(name='World'): return f'Hello, {name}'
Variables inside a function are local — they don't exist outside it
assessmentCriteria: Functions are defined with correct syntax
Return values are used instead of print inside functions
Parameters and default values work correctly
